Stop.osx: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | sed -n 's/.*"cwd"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if command -v terminal-notifier &>/dev/null; then terminal-notifier -title 'GitHub Copilot' -message 'Response complete' -sound 'Glass' -execute "open -a 'Visual Studio Code' \"$cwd\""; else osascript -e 'display notification "Response complete" with title "GitHub Copilot" sound name "Glass"'; fi
